body.title: Build audit-audits skill — meta-audit over all audit telemetry
body.result: Built ~/.claude/skills/audit-audits/SKILL.md describing 8 analyzers (recurring smell promotion, upstream-miss accumulation, watch-for ROI, dead-check retirement, false-positive sweeps, cost-per-finding, habit health, cross-layer coherence). Inputs from telemetry corpus only (no codebase reads). Outputs candidate proposals as palace nodes; /decided is the gate. Habit metrics update direct. CRITICAL/HIGH/MED/LOW severity. Cadence: Sonnet weekly (7d), Opus monthly (30d). Helper described: AuditAuditsEngine(IgorBase) with one method per analyzer; schema locked in T-audit-telemetry-shape; engine builds against contract. Tests: 3998 passed.
body.description:
Meta-audit that consumes every other audit's structured output. Inputs: all theigors/audits/*/runs/* in window; theigors/audits/*/watch_next/*; audit-skip override log; SensorTree counter trends. NO codebase reads.

Analyses: recurring smell patterns (≥3 runs across ≥2 tickets → propose palace-rule promotion); upstream-miss accumulation (audit-smell catching what audit-ticket should catch → propose layer-rebalance); watch-for ROI (notes hitting ≥2 times → promote to check; never-hit in 14d → expire); audit dwelling on noise (checks always-pass / always-overridden → propose retirement); false-positive sweeps (overrides clustering on one check → propose tightening); cost-per-finding (tokens / material findings → propose downgrade or pruning); habit health (cadence drift, TTR on findings); cross-layer coherence (e.g., audit-design said 'atomic' but audit-ticket flagged splits → tighten decomposition).

Outputs: candidate palace-rule promotions (auto-drafted, /decided to file); candidate check retirements (auto-drafted, manual gate); layer-rebalance proposals; watch-for promotions/demotions (automated, idempotent); habit-health metric updates; 'audit-process drift' report.

Cadence: Sonnet weekly, Opus monthly.

**Affected files:** new ~/.claude/skills/audit-audits/SKILL.md. Helper at lab/claudecode/audit_audits_engine.py (analyzers).
**Design rules:** no persistence beyond palace telemetry. oop-first: AnalysisRun class with analyzer methods. docs-in-code: top-of-file docstring on audit_audits_engine.py.
**Test plan:** seed 3 weeks of run-records with a recurring smell → audit-audits flags promotion candidate. Watch-for note that hit 3x → promoted to check candidate. Check that fired 50x and was overridden 50x → retirement candidate. Telemetry recorded (yes, audit-audits emits its own record — recursion ends at 1 level).
